## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat`: New feature
- [ ] `fix`: Bug fix
- [ ] `docs`: Documentation only
- [ ] `test`: Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `refactor`: Code refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] `chore`: Maintenance or tooling

- [ ] Code passes linting (`ruff check`)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`ruff format`)
